text.title: agentic-rag-self-correction Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-rag-self-correction as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the same model instance for generation and verification.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models confirm their own hallucinations. The verifier must be independent: different model family, or at minimum different temperature and system prompt. Use Haiku for verification, Opus/Sonnet for generation.

failure-mode.description: Surfacing an answer to the user when verified=False after max_corrections.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An unverified answer after exhausting correction cycles is evidence of a corpus gap or a genuinely unanswerable question. Route to human review rather than silently serving a low-confidence answer.

failure-mode.description: Self-correction loops that retrieve more context without updating the generation prompt to reference the new chunks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Adding chunks to the context list without re-indexing them in the prompt means the generator sees the same prompt body and produces the same answer. Always rebuild the context block from scratch on each iteration.
